ES:1

Ip: 128.1.6.5/12
Ip binario: 10000000.0000 0001.00000110.00000101
maschera:   11111111.1111 0000.00000000.00000000 = 255.240.0.0

rete:      10000000.0000 0000.00000000.00000000 =128.0.0.0
broadcast: 10000000.0000 1111.11111111.11111111 =128.15.255.255

gateway1: 10000000.0000 0000.00000000.00000001 =128.0.0.1
gateway2: 10000000.0000 1111.11111111.11111110 =128.15.255.254

numero massimo host o sottoreti: 2^20= 1.048.574

rete: 1.5 ottetti
host: 2.5 ottetti

Ip: 200.1.2.3/24
Ip binario: 11001000.00000001.00000010. 00000011
maschera:   11111111.11111111.11111111. 00000000 =255.255.255.0

rete:       11001000.00000001.00000010. 00000000 =200.1.2.0
broadcast:  11001000.00000001.00000010. 11111111 =200.1.2.255

gateway1: 11001000.00000001.00000010. 00000001 =200.1.2.1
gateway2: 11001000.00000001.00000010. 11111110 =200.1.2.254

rete: 3 ottetti
host: 1 ottetti

maschera:   11111111.11111111.111111 00.00000000 =255.255.252.0

rete:       11000000.11000000.000000 00.00000000 =192.192.0.0
broadcast:  11000000.11000000.000000 11.11111111 =192.192.3.255

gateway1:   11000000.11000000.000000 00.00000001 =192.192.0.1
gateway2:   11000000.11000000.000000 11.11111110 =192.192.3.254

rete:       10101100.00010000. 00000000.00000000 = 172.16.0.0
